notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Matt Vierling doubles (9) on a sharp fly ball to center fielder Kyle Isbel. Hao-Yu Lee scores. Zack Short scores. Matt Vierling to 3rd. Matt Vierling advances to 3rd, on a fielding error by center fielder Kyle Isbel.

notableEvents.label: Jahmai Jones reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Jahmai Jones reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Maikel Garcia.

notableEvents.detail: Colt Keith flies out to left fielder Isaac Collins.

notableEvents.label: Zach McKinstry pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Zach McKinstry lines out to left fielder Isaac Collins.

notableEvents.label: Gage Workman pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Gage Workman homers (1) on a fly ball to right field. Spencer Torkelson scores.
